identity.name: Vicky Kumar
identity.title: Backend Developer
identity.summary: Backend Developer specializing in Go, Python, Java, and LLM/AI agent workflows. I build scalable distributed systems, authentication platforms, event-driven pipelines, and AI-powered products. Currently at Eka.Care building healthcare infrastructure.
identity.tagline: I build the infrastructure that powers intelligent systems — from auth platforms to AI agents.

highlights: Architected a centralized OAuth2 + OpenID Connect authentication platform powering Eka Care EMR, PHR, Scribe, and partner products
Built full OAuth2/OIDC provider supporting Login with Google, Apple, and other identity providers
Designed an Auth Console for managing OAuth clients, API keys, scopes, and access policies
Developed an AI Agent integrated with ChatGPT to enable AI-assisted workflows for EMR and Scribe
Created AWS Lambda Authorizers integrated with API Gateway for request authentication
Implemented CloudFront Functions for dynamic redirects across products and login flows
Designed a rate-limiting adapter service to mitigate abuse and DDoS using mobile, email, and OAuth identities
Architected the Scribe platform backend for doctor dictation and doctor-patient consultations
Designed an event-driven voice-to-text pipeline using AWS SNS, SQS, S3, and Lambda
Built MCP servers exposing secure drug database search APIs with auth, rate limiting, and audit logging
Optimized end-to-end audio processing latency from 20 seconds to 5-10 seconds per consultation
Contributed to 40%+ month-over-month growth in daily Scribe consultations
Led integrations with Medanta, Cliniik, and NIC (Government of India)
Architected GCP data migration strategy reducing cloud infrastructure costs by 65%
Integrated open-source medical imaging viewer saving $300K+ annually in licensing fees
Led monolith to microservices migration improving system performance by 40%
Built radiology reporting system with LLM integration reducing radiologist reporting time by 50%
Developed 50+ REST APIs supporting radiology workflows
Optimized bulk DICOM processing enabling throughput of 10K+ images per minute from 1,000+ hospitals
Implemented async data export handling 100K+ medical records with 60% faster DB queries
Integrated voice dictation for radiologists and deployed across 100+ hospitals in India and APAC
Developed custom Salesforce solutions using Aura, Lightning Web Components (LWC), SOQL, and JavaScript
Built REST API for CSV import/export enabling bidirectional data transfer between external databases and Salesforce CRM
Performed data cleaning, transformation, and manipulation using Python on Databricks platform with MySQL, PySpark, and Jupyter Notebook

projects.name: Medical AI Health Assessment
projects.description: Web application integrating Claude AI for dynamic health assessment questionnaires generating personalized medical insights. Automated medical summary generation with diagnosis, medications, and recommendations to assist healthcare professionals. Designed to optimize OPD efficiency and improve patient-doctor interaction workflows.

projects.name: Generic Webhook Dispatch System
projects.description: Generic webhook backend microservice in Go supporting event delivery across multiple protocols. Clients can register webhooks for HTTP/HTTPS, AWS SQS, SNS, and Lambda. Uses async dispatch architecture with Go routines and channels. Decouples request ingestion from delivery execution for high reliability and scalability.

projects.name: Student Monitoring System with Facial Recognition
projects.description: Multi-role system with class management, assignment distribution, and automated attendance tracking using facial recognition. Includes manual override capability, scheduled email notifications, and comprehensive student management with enrollment, assignment submission, and progress tracking.

highlights: Rank 64/1078 in HackerRank Celebrate Pride 2021
Rank 44/31K in CodeChef March Challenge 2021
Consistently in top 300 competitive programmers

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
